name: ATLANTICA INC
summary: Business Development Our Company was organized pursuant to the laws of the State of Utah on March 3, 1938, under the name Red Hills Mining Company, with an authorized capital of $20,000 divided into 2,000,000 shares of common stock of a par value of $0.01 per share. Our Company was formed for the primary purpose of conducting the business of mining in all of its branches. On February 5, 1953, we changed our name to Allied Oil and Minerals Company, with our primary purpose continuing to be mining...
